calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Motion For Order Granting Default Judgment Per Ccp 585; Declaration Of Plaintiffs President Louis Hsiao; & [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:48:51 a.m. and concluding at 11:22:33 a.m.

James Howard, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Concept Designs Inc.
Defendant Swyft Inc. not appearing.

LOUIS HISAO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.
LOUIS HISAO is examined by the Court.

Plaintiff's counsel makes oral motion to dismiss Doe Defendants.
The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's oral motion.

Plaintiff Concept Designs Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Louis Hsiao
Exhibit 2: Declaration of Roger Morse

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Concept Designs Inc, and against Defendant Swyft Inc, as follows:

1. Damages: $88,415.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $17,319.66
3. Sanctions: $1,050.00

Attorney fees waived.

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $106,784.71

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for order granting default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 01:56:49 p.m. and concluding at 02:02:16 p.m.

Plaintiff concept Designs, Inc. a California Corporation represented by Joseph Frondle, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Swyft, Inc. not appearing.

Order Setting Aside Answer and Entering Default of Defendant Swyft, Inc. filed May-18-2022.

Plaintiff has no witness present.
Court will not proceed without the testimony of Plaintiff's witness.

Court orders matter continued to May-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505. Plaintiff shall be prepared to show how it arrived at the amount of damages sought.

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Disco Set One
Off Calendar May-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM:
James Howard, Esq. (626.284.6320; jameshoward626@gmail.com) for Plaintiff (audio only).
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
